title: Pre-registered evaluation protocol: MLB model vs the market

hypotheses.primary: Model home-win probability beats the no-vig market probability on Brier score across all priced games.
hypotheses.secondary: Official picks show positive closing line value against the last pre-first-pitch snapshot.

data.freeze_rule: First prediction exported per game per day is frozen; intraday re-exports never revise a logged row.
data.market_baseline: No-vig DraftKings home probability from the day's single odds download; zero additional odds API calls.
data.grading: Nightly, automated, final scores from the free MLB Stats API; idempotent; no_result after 3 days without a final.
data.backfill: Boards archived before 2026-07-04 extracted and graded under identical rules, tagged model_version=v1-raw-rates.

metrics: Cumulative Brier score, model vs market, over paired graded games
Calibration table: predicted home-win buckets vs realized rate with counts
30-day rolling Brier, model vs market, paired games only
Mean CLV on graded picks vs pre-first-pitch closing proxy

evidence_of_skill.brier: model Brier < market Brier over >= 1000 graded games

success_criteria.evidence_of_no_skill: model Brier >= market Brier over >= 1000 graded games
success_criteria.noise_floor_statement: Below 200 graded games the all-games comparison is labelled noise and no conclusion is drawn.

no_peeking.automated_publication: Metrics regenerate and publish on every refresh with no manual step.
no_peeking.amendments: Protocol changes only via dated, append-only amendments in docs/protocol.md; never retroactive.
no_peeking.windows: Headline numbers are cumulative from the first logged game; the 30-day rolling Brier is the only windowed view.

model_versions.v1-raw-rates: Raw Statcast aggregate event rates (boards through 2026-07-03).
model_versions.v2-eb-2026-07-04: Simulation event rates: EB-shrunk, park-adjusted (method-of-moments beta-binomial priors, handedness-split HR park factors) - unified with weight-room-hero-sim methodology, 2026-07-04.

verdict_at_freeze.statement: Market ahead; sample below the noise floor. No evidence of edge.
